description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house set on a spacious green lawn with a paved driveway and walkways. The house features a prominent gable roof with dark shingles, multiple dormer windows, and a covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior is clad in light-colored siding with contrasting trim, and there are numerous symmetrically arranged windows on both floors. A detached garage is visible to one side, connected by a paved path, and a basketball hoop is installed near the driveway. The backyard includes a covered patio area, and the property is bordered by neatly laid brick walkways.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a gable roof, covered porch, detached garage, and extensive paved walkways on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gable roof, and the connection to the detached garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio area, backyard, and additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, driveway, and basketball hoop.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, central door, steps, and overhanging roof
